scenario_name: Scenario 07 — Memory Leak in Event Listener
justification: All pass criteria met: memory leak identified as Critical with detailed mechanism (no close handler, listener closures retaining references, zombie objects accumulating per reconnect cycle); specific fix with close event handler calling removeAllListeners; JSON.parse without try/catch noted (rated Critical rather than Important, but still identified); safe_to_deploy is false; direct connection made to 'steady memory growth over 3 months' symptom.

observations.text: Excellent mechanistic explanation of the leak: listener closures rooting CourierTracker instances, compounding every 5-minute reconnect cycle
Concrete, copy-pasteable fix with close handler calling removeAllListeners and nulling references
JSON.parse crash identified with reproduction steps and fix
Bonus finding: fire-and-forget DB writes with no await/catch compounding the memory issue — adds genuine value
Reproduction steps are detailed and actionable for all findings
JSON.parse issue rated Critical rather than Important/High — while arguable, the rubric expected Important or lower severity
